sigWerErrors.reason: 'el seguimiento' (the tracking) is replaced by 'de seguimiento' (of tracking), which is a minor grammatical change and does not alter the meaning of the sentence.
'verificarlo' (to verify it) and 'revisarlo' (to check it) are near synonyms in this context; the intent remains the same.
Changing 'por la aplicacion' (through the app) to 'en la aplicacion' (in the app) is a minor prepositional difference and does not change the meaning.
The insertion of 'en' before 'el informe electronico' (in the electronic report) is required by Spanish grammar and does not change the meaning.
